overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character walking through an ancient Egyptian town at night. The character travels from a residential street with mud-brick houses through a monumental stone gateway to a waterfront embankment, illuminated by moonlight and torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian residential street with mud-brick houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow residential street lined with houses and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the character on the left side of the street

entered.detail: traditional mud-brick houses with wooden doors and small windows lining both sides of the street
tall palm trees visible above the rooftops against the night sky
larger stone building with columns visible on the left side
strings of fabric or laundry hanging across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow residential street lined with mud-brick houses under moonlight. Torches provide warm illumination against the cool blue night. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and palm trees rise above the rooftops in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to monumental temple gateway with large stone columns

events.description: character passes through the large stone gateway into the temple precinct

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the monumental stone gateway with large columns

entered.detail: massive stone gateway with large columns and lintel, ancient Egyptian architectural style
tall cylindrical stone columns flanking the gateway entrance
wooden scaffolding structure against the right side of the gateway

segments.scene_description: Approaching and passing through a monumental stone gateway with massive columns. The architecture shifts from residential mud-brick to grand stone temple structures. Wooden scaffolding is visible on the right side as the character walks through the gateway into a more open precinct.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront embankment with stone walls and fire brazier

events.description: character reaches the waterfront area with stone embankment and burning fire brazier

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront embankment approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: low stone wall with rounded tops lining the water's edge
large metal brazier with bright flames providing warm illumination
calm water surface of the river or canal reflecting the night sky
wooden plank walkway extending toward the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a waterfront area with stone embankments and a burning fire brazier casting flickering light. The character walks along wooden planks toward the water's edge, with rocky cliffs and palm trees visible in the background. The area is quiet and empty of other people.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet Egyptian town that transforms from a narrow residential street into a grand waterfront precinct. It begins by weaving through a corridor of mud-brick houses under a cool blue moonlight, where warm torchlight flickers against the walls and sparse pedestrians pass by. As the camera advances, the architecture shifts from humble dwellings to monumental stone, passing through a massive gateway flanked by columns and wooden scaffolding. The scene then opens into a wide waterfront area, where the character moves across wooden planks beside stone embankments illuminated by a burning fire brazier. Finally, the view expands to reveal a desolate shoreline set against a backdrop of rocky cliffs and distant palm trees.
